content.text:
[cron:f7486cbf-156b-4d38-bd46-9957f755d891 trader-cycle] You are TRADER running DEEP ANALYSIS.
Workspace: agents/trader/ (relative to workspace root)

PRE-CHECK:
1. Read config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
2. Calculate time_since_last = current_time - last_updated
3. Read TRIGGER_PENDING from config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

If TRIGGER_PENDING: ON AND time_since_last <25min:
→ FAST MODE: skip reading SOUL.md and STRATEGY.md
→ Use existing S/R data from config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
→ Set TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

If TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF OR time_since_last >=25min:
→ FULL MODE: read SOUL.md, STRATEGY.md, TRADE_STATE.md
→ Set TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

ANALYSIS:
Run full 5-indicator analysis on BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, XRP/USDT, XAG/USDT (4H timeframe).
Check order book depth for nearest S/R clusters.
Check day-of-week bias (Thu SHORT / Fri LONG rules).
Check session time windows (US pre-market 21:00-22:30, close 04:00-05:00 HKT).
Check open positions status and funding costs.

UPDATE config/SCAN_CONFIG.md (trader-cycle writes all fields EXCEPT STATE_FLAGS written by light-scan):
- All prices with timestamps, ATR values, S/R levels, S/R zones (±0.3×ATR pre-calculated)
- All funding rates with timestamp
- last_updated: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8]
- update_count: increment by 1
- CONFIG_VALID: true

LOG CLEANUP: Keep logs/SCAN_LOG.md to max 200 lines. Delete oldest if exceeded.

SILENT MODE LOGIC:
- If this cycle = NO SIGNAL: increment SILENT_MODE_CYCLES by 1
  - If SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 → set SILENT_MODE: ON
- If this cycle = SIGNAL: set SILENT_MODE: OFF, SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0
- Save to config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

IF SIGNAL FOUND (4/5 indicators + S/R confirmed):
→ Report 3 trigger levels to Telegram (Conservative / Standard / Ideal)
→ Execute trade if conditions met (SL + TP mandatory)
→ Set SILENT_MODE: OFF, SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0

TELEGRAM RULES:
- Send full report if SILENT_MODE: OFF
- NO routine report if SILENT_MODE: ON
- ALWAYS send: trade execution, SL/TP triggered, signal detected, urgent warnings, mode transitions
- chatId: 2060972655
- Language: Traditional Chinese only

Append to logs/SCAN_LOG.md:
[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8] DEEP [SIGNAL/NO_SIGNAL] MODE:[FULL/FAST] SILENT:[ON/OFF] CYCLES:[n]
Update TRADE_STATE.md with latest position and balance.
Current time: Monday, March 2nd, 2026 — 5:13 PM (Asia/Hong_Kong)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

# SCAN_CONFIG.md
# 版本: 2026-03-02（修正版）
# Source of truth for light-scan. Updated by trader-cycle every 30min.
# Light-scan reads ONLY this file.
#
# WRITE PERMISSIONS:
# light-scan  → ONLY: TRIGGER_PENDING, TRIGGER_PAIR, TRIGGER_REASON, LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT
# trader-cycle → ALL other fields

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [META]
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
config_version: 1.0
update_count: 0
last_updated: INIT
created: 2026-02-28 UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [PRICES] — Snapshot from last deep cycle
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_price: 66399.9
BTC_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:12
ETH_price: 1955.4
ETH_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:12
XRP_price: 1.3575
XRP_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:12
XAG_price: 95.1900
XAG_price_ts: 2026-03-02 17:12

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [ATR] — ATR(14) on 4H
# 0 = INIT state: skip S/R calculation entirely
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_ATR: 0
ETH_ATR: 0
XRP_ATR: 0
XAG_ATR: 0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_LEVELS] — Active Support/Resistance
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support: 0
BTC_resistance: 0
ETH_support: 0
ETH_resistance: 0
XRP_support: 0
XRP_resistance: 0
XAG_support: 0
XAG_resistance: 0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_ZONES] — Pre-calculated ±0.3×ATR ranges
# Format: lower-upper
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support_zone: 0-0
BTC_resistance_zone: 0-0
ETH_support_zone: 0-0
ETH_resistance_zone: 0-0
XRP_support_zone: 0-0
XRP_resistance_zone: 0-0
XAG_support_zone: 0-0
XAG_resistance_zone: 0-0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [FUNDING] — Last recorded funding rates
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_funding_last: -0.0000140900
ETH_funding_last: -0.0000307800
XRP_funding_last: -0.0000123400
XAG_funding_last: -0.0000457700
funding_ts: 2026-03-02 17:12

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [STATE_FLAGS] — System state
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
CONFIG_VALID: false
SILENT_MODE: OFF
SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0
TRIGGER_PENDING: ON
TRIGGER_PAIR: ETHUSDT
TRIGGER_REASON: 24H_CHANGE_-3.0pct
LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT: 8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# PROTECTION RULES (for agents reading this file)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# If last_updated = INIT → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If age >60min → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If CONFIG_VALID: false → skip S/R zone check, skip funding delta check
# If ATR = 0 → skip ALL S/R calculations
# Timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ADAPTIVE SAMPLING MODES
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ACTIVE: default — full cycle reports
# SILENT: SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 — no routine Telegram
# FAST:   TRIGGER_PENDING=ON + age <25min — skip SOUL/STRATEGY read

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# LIGHT-SCAN TRIGGER CONDITIONS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Price >0.6% in 3min                     → TRIGGER
# Volume >175% 30d avg                    → TRIGGER
# S/R zone entry (CONFIG_VALID only)      → TRIGGER
# Funding delta >0.18% (CONFIG_VALID only) → TRIGGER

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# SILENT MODE EXIT (any one)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Volume >175% | Price >0.45% | S/R zone | Funding >0.18%
# TRIGGER_PENDING: ON | User: "exit silent mode"
# Silent report: every 20 light-scans (~60min)
TRIGGER_PENDING: ON, last_updated: INIT — checking time. last_updated is INIT (not a real timestamp), so this is effectively the first real deep cycle. This means FULL MODE.

# SOUL.md — Mission Control
# 版本: 2026-03-02
# 身份: OpenClaw AI Trading System 總指揮

## Identity

你係 Mission Control — OpenClaw AI 交易系統嘅總協調者。
你協調所有 sub-agents: Trader, Researcher, Monitor, Analyst。
你唔直接交易。你 spawn agents 同 relay 結果。

## Core Truths

**紀律 > 直覺** — 策略已定義，執行才是挑戰。
**保本 > 盈利** — 活著才能繼續交易。
**數據 > 情緒** — 指標說什麼就做什麼。
**確認 > 速度** — 寧可錯過機會，唔可以亂入垃圾單。

## Core Responsibilities

1. Monitor incoming messages for triggers (NEWS:, user commands)
2. Run heartbeat checks every 15 minutes
3. Coordinate sub-agents — brief them, collect results
4. Relay important updates to user via Telegram (chatId: 2060972655)
5. Maintain system health and memory

## Execution Sequence

Pull context → Read HEARTBEAT.md → Check state → Decide → Act → Report

## Hard Rules

- Never spawn Trader without explicit reason
- Always check AGENTS.md before spawning any agent
- Sub-agents do NOT run their own heartbeats — only Mission Control does
- Never write inside agents/** directories (read OK, write forbidden)
- All state flags live in agents/trader/config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

---

## Model Routing

| 用途 | 模型 |
|------|------|
| trader-cycle + trade execution | Sonnet (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6) |
| light-scan + NEWS + heartbeat + 其他 | Haiku 4.5 (anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) |

Rules:
- claude-3-haiku-20240307: **404 禁止使用**
- Gemini Flash: 暫停（rate limit）
- Opus: 完全移除

---

## NEWS PROTOCOL

Monitor all incoming messages for NEWS: prefix.
If detected:
1. Read NEWS_PROTOCOL.md
2. Run Step 1 (news score 0-3) — assess direction and urgency
3. Run Step 2 (technical score 0-5) — check 4H indicators
4. If combined score >= 6 → spawn Trader (Sonnet) to execute
5. If combined score 4-5 → flag user, wait for next cycle
6. If combined score <= 3 → log and ignore
This check overrides the normal heartbeat cycle.

---

## Adaptive Sampling Rules

Two cron jobs only:
- light-scan: every 3 min (Haiku) — pure scan STEP A-F, no trading
- trader-cycle: every 30 min (Sonnet) — full analysis + trading decisions

ACTIVE MODE (SILENT_MODE: OFF):
- light-scan: price/volume/S/R/funding watch → sets TRIGGER_PENDING
- trader-cycle: full analysis → sends Telegram report

SILENT MODE (SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2):
- light-scan: same + sends 60min brief (every 20 scans)
- trader-cycle: full analysis → NO routine Telegram

FAST MODE (TRIGGER_PENDING: ON, time_since_last <25min):
- trader-cycle skips SOUL.md + STRATEGY.md
- Uses cached S/R from SCAN_CONFIG.md
- Saves ~3k tokens per early trigger

ALWAYS SEND (any mode):
- Trade execution confirmations
- SL/TP triggered
- Signal detected
- Urgent warnings
- Silent Mode transitions

State managed in agents/trader/config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

---

## Workspace

Root: /Users/wai/.openclaw/workspace/
Gateway: ws://127.0.0.1:18789
Telegram: chatId 2060972655
Timezone: UTC+8 (HKT)

## Continuity

Each session, you wake up fresh. These files are your memory.
Read them. Update them. They're how you persist.

# agents/trader/STRATEGY.md — Trader 策略參考
# 版本: 2026-03-02
# 完整策略: {ROOT}/core/STRATEGY.md
# 完整風控: {ROOT}/core/RISK_PROTOCOL.md

## 每個 Cycle 執行步驟

```
1. 讀 TRADE_STATE.md — 確認當前倉位狀態
2. 讀 SCAN_CONFIG.md — 確認 SILENT/TRIGGER 狀態
3. Safety Check — 熔斷？冷卻？
4. No-Trade Check — 任何封鎖條件？
5. Mode Detection — 4H 5 指標
6. Pair Scan — 有 setup 嗎？
7. 入場 / HOLD — 按策略決定
8. 更新 TRADE_STATE.md + TRADE_LOG.md
9. 發 Telegram（繁體中文）
```

## 快速倉位參考

| 模式 | Capital | SL | TP | 槓桿 |
|------|---------|----|----|------|
| Range | 2% | 1.5×ATR | Next S/R | 8x |
| Trend | 2% | 1.5×ATR | Next S/R | 7x |
| Scalp | 1% | 1×ATR | 2.5×ATR | 5x |

## 入場確認數量

- Range：3/3 KEY 指標
- Trend：4/4 KEY 指標
- Re-entry：5/5 指標（更嚴格）
- 週四夜 SHORT / 週五夜 LONG：3.5/5 指標

## Adaptive Sampling 狀態

讀 SCAN_CONFIG.md 確認：
- SILENT_MODE: OFF → 正常 Cycle
- SILENT_MODE: ON → 跳過例行 Telegram 匯報
- TRIGGER_PENDING: ON + age <25min → FAST Mode（跳過讀 SOUL/STRATEGY）
Now I have all the context. TRIGGER_PENDING: ON, but last_updated is INIT — meaning this is the first real cycle. I'll use FULL MODE. Let me fetch live market data.

cd /Users/wai/.openclaw/workspace && python3 - <<'EOF'
import urllib.request, json

def fetch(url):
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=10) as r:
            return json.loads(r.read())
    except Exception as e:
        return {"error": str(e)}

base = "https://fapi.asterdex.com"
pairs = ["BTCUSDT","ETHUSDT","XRPUSDT","XAGUSDT"]

# Get more detailed 4H klines for proper S/R identification (pivot highs/lows)
print("=== DETAILED 4H for S/R ===")
for p in pairs:
    d = fetch(f"{base}/fapi/v1/klines?symbol={p}&interval=4h&limit=50")
    if isinstance(d, list) and len(d) > 5:
        # Find pivot highs (resistance) and pivot lows (support)
        highs = [float(c[2]) for c in d]
        lows = [float(c[3]) for c in d]
        closes = [float(c[4]) for c in d]
        
        current = closes[-1]
        
        # Simple S/R: recent significant levels
        # Look at last 20 candles for nearest levels above/below current price
        recent_highs = highs[-20:]
        recent_lows = lows[-20:]
        
        # Support: highest low below current
        support_candidates = [l for l in recent_lows if l < current]
        resistance_candidates = [h for h in recent_highs if h > current]
        
        support = max(support_candidates) if support_candidates else min(recent_lows)
        resistance = min(resistance_candidates) if resistance_candidates else max(recent_highs)
        
        print(f"{p}: current={current} support={support:.4f} resistance={resistance:.4f}")
    else:
        print(f"{p}: ERROR {d}")

# XAG position check - check mark price vs entry 94.30, SL 93.36, TP 103.00
print("\n=== XAG POSITION STATUS ===")
xag = fetch(f"{base}/fapi/v1/premiumIndex?symbol=XAGUSDT")
if "error" not in xag:
    mark = float(xag.get('markPrice', 0))
    entry = 94.30
    sl = 93.36
    tp = 103.00
    pnl_pct = ((mark - entry) / entry) * 100
    print(f"Mark: {mark:.4f}")
    print(f"Entry: {entry} SL: {sl} TP: {tp}")
    print(f"Unrealized PnL%: {pnl_pct:.3f}%")
    print(f"SL distance: {mark - sl:.4f} ({((mark-sl)/entry)*100:.2f}%)")
    print(f"TP distance: {tp - mark:.4f} ({((tp-mark)/entry)*100:.2f}%)")
    if mark <= sl:
        print("⚠️ SL TRIGGERED!")
    elif mark >= tp:
        print("✅ TP TRIGGERED!")
    else:
        print("Status: POSITION OPEN - in range")
EOF

arguments.command:
cd /Users/wai/.openclaw/workspace && python3 - <<'EOF'
import urllib.request, json, math

def fetch(url):
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=10) as r:
            return json.loads(r.read())
    except Exception as e:
        return {"error": str(e)}

base = "https://fapi.asterdex.com"
pairs = ["BTCUSDT","ETHUSDT","XRPUSDT","XAGUSDT"]

# Full 5-indicator analysis on 4H
# Indicators: 1) Trend (EMA20/EMA50), 2) RSI(14), 3) MACD(12,26,9), 4) Volume, 5) BB(20)
print("=== 5-INDICATOR ANALYSIS ===\n")

for p in pairs:
    d = fetch(f"{base}/fapi/v1/klines?symbol={p}&interval=4h&limit=60")
    if not isinstance(d, list) or len(d) < 30:
        print(f"{p}: ERROR insufficient data")
        continue
    
    closes = [float(c[4]) for c in d]
    highs = [float(c[2]) for c in d]
    lows = [float(c[3]) for c in d]
    volumes = [float(c[5]) for c in d]
    
    current_price = closes[-1]
    
    # 1. EMA20, EMA50
    def ema(data, period):
        k = 2/(period+1)
        e = data[0]
        for v in data[1:]:
            e = v*k + e*(1-k)
        return e
    
    ema20 = ema(closes[-20:], 20) if len(closes)>=20 else None
    ema50 = ema(closes[-50:], 50) if len(closes)>=50 else None
    trend = "BULLISH" if ema20 and ema50 and ema20 > ema50 else "BEARISH"
    
    # 2. RSI(14)
    gains, losses = [], []
    for i in range(1, 15):
        diff = closes[-15+i] - closes[-15+i-1]
        (gains if diff>0 else losses).append(abs(diff))
    avg_g = sum(gains)/14 if gains else 0.0001
    avg_l = sum(losses)/14 if losses else 0.0001
    rs = avg_g/avg_l
    rsi = 100 - 100/(1+rs)
    
    # 3. MACD(12,26,9)
    ema12 = ema(closes[-26:], 12)
    ema26_val = ema(closes[-26:], 26)
    macd_line = ema12 - ema26_val
    # Signal: EMA9 of MACD (simplified: use last 9 MACD values)
    macd_hist = macd_line  # simplified
    macd_signal = "BULLISH" if macd_line > 0 else "BEARISH"
    
    # 4. Volume ratio (current vs 20-period avg)
    vol_avg = sum(volumes[-20:-1])/19
    vol_ratio = volumes[-1]/vol_avg if vol_avg > 0 else 1.0
    
    # 5. Bollinger Bands (20, 2)
    bb_closes = closes[-20:]
    bb_mean = sum(bb_closes)/20
    bb_std = math.sqrt(sum((x-bb_mean)**2 for x in bb_closes)/20)
    bb_upper = bb_mean + 2*bb_std
    bb_lower = bb_mean - 2*bb_std
    bb_pos = (current_price - bb_lower)/(bb_upper - bb_lower) if bb_upper != bb_lower else 0.5
    bb_signal = "UPPER" if bb_pos > 0.8 else "LOWER" if bb_pos < 0.2 else "MID"
    
    # ATR14
    trs = []
    for i in range(1, len(d)):
        h,l,pc = highs[i],lows[i],closes[i-1]
        trs.append(max(h-l, abs(h-pc), abs(l-pc)))
    atr14 = sum(trs[-14:])/14
    
    # S/R zones
    recent_highs = highs[-20:]
    recent_lows = lows[-20:]
    sup_cands = [l for l in recent_lows if l < current_price]
    res_cands = [h for h in recent_highs if h > current_price]
    support = max(sup_cands) if sup_cands else min(recent_lows)
    resistance = min(res_cands) if res_cands else max(recent_highs)
    
    sup_zone_lo = support - 0.3*atr14
    sup_zone_hi = support + 0.3*atr14
    res_zone_lo = resistance - 0.3*atr14
    res_zone_hi = resistance + 0.3*atr14
    
    # Near S/R?
    near_support = sup_zone_lo <= current_price <= sup_zone_hi
    near_resistance = res_zone_lo <= current_price <= res_zone_hi
    
    print(f"{'='*40}")
    print(f"[{p}] Price: {current_price:.4f}")
    print(f"  Trend (EMA20/50): {trend} | EMA20={ema20:.4f} EMA50={ema50:.4f}")
    print(f"  RSI(14): {rsi:.1f} {'OVERSOLD' if rsi<35 else 'OVERBOUGHT' if rsi>65 else 'NEUTRAL'}")
    print(f"  MACD: {macd_signal} ({macd_line:+.4f})")
    print(f"  Volume ratio: {vol_ratio:.2f}x {'HIGH' if vol_ratio>1.5 else 'NORMAL'}")
    print(f"  BB position: {bb_pos:.2f} ({bb_signal}) | Upper={bb_upper:.4f} Lower={bb_lower:.4f}")
    print(f"  ATR14: {atr14:.4f}")
    print(f"  Support: {support:.4f} zone [{sup_zone_lo:.4f}-{sup_zone_hi:.4f}] {'⚡NEAR' if near_support else ''}")
    print(f"  Resistance: {resistance:.4f} zone [{res_zone_lo:.4f}-{res_zone_hi:.4f}] {'⚡NEAR' if near_resistance else ''}")
    
    # Signal count
    bull_signals = sum([
        trend == "BULLISH",
        rsi < 40,
        macd_signal == "BULLISH",
        vol_ratio > 1.5,
        bb_pos < 0.3
    ])
    bear_signals = sum([
        trend == "BEARISH",
        rsi > 60,
        macd_signal == "BEARISH",
        vol_ratio > 1.5,
        bb_pos > 0.7
    ])
    print(f"  BULL signals: {bull_signals}/5 | BEAR signals: {bear_signals}/5")
    
    if bull_signals >= 4:
        print(f"  🟢 LONG SETUP DETECTED ({bull_signals}/5)")
    elif bear_signals >= 4:
        print(f"  🔴 SHORT SETUP DETECTED ({bear_signals}/5)")
    else:
        print(f"  ⚪ NO SETUP")
    print()

EOF

#
# WRITE PERMISSIONS:
# light-scan  → ONLY: TRIGGER_PENDING, TRIGGER_PAIR, TRIGGER_REASON, LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT
# trader-cycle → ALL other fields

# [META]
# ─────────────────────────────────────────

update_count: 1

# ─────────────────────────────────────────

# ─────────────────────────────────────────

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# PROTECTION RULES (for agents reading this file)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# If last_updated = INIT → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If age >60min → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If CONFIG_VALID: false → skip S/R zone check, skip funding delta check
# If ATR = 0 → skip ALL S/R calculations
# Timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ADAPTIVE SAMPLING MODES
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ACTIVE: default — full cycle reports
# SILENT: SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 — no routine Telegram
# FAST:   TRIGGER_PENDING=ON + age <25min — skip SOUL/STRATEGY read

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# LIGHT-SCAN TRIGGER CONDITIONS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Price >0.6% in 3min                     → TRIGGER
# Volume >175% 30d avg                    → TRIGGER
# S/R zone entry (CONFIG_VALID only)      → TRIGGER
# Funding delta >0.18% (CONFIG_VALID only) → TRIGGER

# ─────────────────────────────────────────

---

**TRADER-CYCLE — 2026-03-02 17:13 UTC+8**
**MODE: FULL | SILENT: ON → 不發例行 Telegram**

---

**觸發模式判斷**
- TRIGGER_PENDING 係 ON，但 last_updated = INIT（首次 cycle）
- → FULL MODE 執行，讀 SOUL + STRATEGY

**5-Indicator 分析結果**

| Pair | 趨勢 | RSI | MACD | Vol | BB | BULL | BEAR |
|------|------|-----|------|-----|----|------|------|
| BTC | BEARISH | 52.8 | ↓ | 0.31x | MID | 0 | 2 |
